comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
@zloyden 
After testing in a private browser window, I concluded that java is required for the login process.
`
@@||researchgate.net^$stealth=flash|java
`
Remove java from the rule, and I am blocked immediately after clicking the "Log in" button.
The other options seem to be unnecessary.

issue.title: www.wunderground.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router

System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | Opera

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [NSFW] [https://www.1377x.to/home/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.1377x.to%2Fhome%2F) ### Comment > If you login to this website - https://www.1377x.to/home/ > > you get this annoying pop-up which has started coming up from tody onward, which I have noticed. > > From my understanding this pop-up is not an authentic robot/ human detection verifcation process, rather its just an misleading/ annoying pop-up, where if you click anywhere on the pop-up > it takes you to some other random websites. > > So what I have noticed is that Ad-guard is not able to block it, since this pop-up has an marquee animation effect (same like that old DVD icon where it keeps moving around the tv screen all the time). ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/lovthe4vr5s4co0kwcs0g88gs4k04c4f0sade9of5c.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.62 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [NSFW] [https://www.1377x.to/home/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.1377x.to%2Fhome%2F) ### Comment > If you login to this website - https://www.1377x.to/home/ > > you get this annoying pop-up which has started coming up from tody onward, which I have noticed. > > From my understanding this pop-up is not an authentic robot/ human detection verifcation process, rather its just an misleading/ annoying pop-up, where if you click anywhere on the pop-up > it takes you to some other random websites. > > So what I have noticed is that Ad-guard is not able to block it, since this pop-up has an marquee animation effect (same like that old DVD icon where it keeps moving around the tv screen all the time). ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/lovthe4vr5s4co0kwcs0g88gs4k04c4f0sade9of5c.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.62 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.google.com/search?q=galaxy+watch+ultra&client=firefox-b-m&hs=KB5p&channel=ts&udm=2](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.google.com%2Fsearch%3Fq%3Dgalaxy%2Bwatch%2Bultra%26client%3Dfirefox-b-m%26hs%3DKB5p%26channel%3Dts%26udm%3D2) ### Comment > Werbung in der Bildersuche von Google. Anzeige mit dem Hinweis "gesponsert" ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8udbu422a04kkgcg4c0c8448kw8swg0jljjnkdczoo.jpg?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://istreameast.app/fifa-world-cup/new-zealand-iran/39833536](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fistreameast.app%2Ffifa-world-cup%2Fnew-zealand-iran%2F39833536) ### Comment > El bloqueado de anuncios funciona correctamente, sin embargo, al mantener activado AdGuard para MacOS, cualquier página en istreameast.app para visualizar deportes no carga lo necesario para mantener el streaming en el reproductor de la página, marcando el error "Error code: hls: networkError_levelLoadError" al darle click al botón de play en el reproductor.
